ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor from which the data is collected */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time of the data collection */,
  "value_1" REAL /* First measurement value (e.g., temperature) */,
  "value_2" REAL /* Second measurement value (e.g., pressure) */,
  "value_3" REAL /* Third measurement value (e.g., humidity) */,
  "value_4" REAL /* Fourth measurement value (e.g., light intensity) */,
  "value_5" REAL /* Fifth measurement value (e.g., sound level) */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "measurement_unit_1" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for value_1 */,
  "measurement_unit_2" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for value_2 */,
  "measurement_unit_3" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for value_3 */,
  "measurement_unit_4" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for value_4 */,
  "measurement_unit_5" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for value_5 */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last sensor calibration */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor installation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_interval" INTEGER /* Interval at which the sensor needs to be calibrated (in days) */,
  "last_calibrated" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "next_calibration_due" TEXT /* Date of the next calibration due */,
  "maintenance_log" TEXT /* Log of maintenance activities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_masks" (
  "mask_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mask entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding sensor data */,
  "mask_1" INTEGER /* Mask indicating filtering criteria for value_1 */,
  "mask_2" INTEGER /* Mask indicating filtering criteria for value_2 */,
  "mask_3" INTEGER /* Mask indicating filtering criteria for value_3 */,
  "mask_4" INTEGER /* Mask indicating filtering criteria for value_4 */,
  "mask_5" INTEGER /* Mask indicating filtering criteria for value_5 */,
  "mask_description" TEXT /* Description of the mask */,
  "mask_created_by" TEXT /* User who created the mask */,
  "mask_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mask was created */,
  "mask_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the mask */,
  "mask_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mask was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mask_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_masks_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, operator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "account_locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the account is locked */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each sensor data reading
Reference to the sensor from which the data is collected
Reference to the location of the sensor
Date of the last sensor calibration
Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low)
Current operational status of the sensor
Date when the sensor was installed
Interval at which the sensor needs to be calibrated (in days)
Date of the next calibration due
Unique identifier for each mask entry
Reference to the corresponding sensor data
Mask indicating filtering criteria for value_1
Mask indicating filtering criteria for value_2
Mask indicating filtering criteria for value_3
Mask indicating filtering criteria for value_4
Mask indicating filtering criteria for value_5
Timestamp when the mask was created
User who last updated the mask
Timestamp when the mask was last updated
Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, operator)
Indicates if the account is locked
